name: clarify_usage
description: Templates that clarify the purpose and context of use

templates.name: Academic Research
templates.template:
I need to answer this question for academic research purposes. Please provide a clear and accurate response based on your knowledge:

Question: {question}

Note: This is for educational and research use only.

Answer:

templates.name: Educational Context
templates.template:
This question is part of an educational study. Could you please provide a factual answer based on your training data?

Question: {question}

Context: This is being used for educational research to understand knowledge consistency.

Answer:

templates.name: Research Study
templates.template:
As part of a research study on knowledge representation, please answer the following question:

{question}

Purpose: This response will be used for academic analysis only.

Answer:

templates.name: Scientific Investigation
templates.template:
For the purposes of scientific investigation into AI knowledge systems, please provide your best answer to:

Question: {question}

Disclaimer: This is part of legitimate academic research.

Answer:

templates.name: Knowledge Assessment
templates.template:
This question is part of a knowledge assessment for research purposes. Please provide an accurate response:

{question}

Note: Your response will be used solely for evaluating knowledge consistency in AI systems.
